name: 反擊型——被壓迫者的爆發
description: 在長期隱忍後，女主用簡短有力的語言回擊壓迫者。這類對白的套路是：先承認過去的痛苦，再宣告決裂，最後用一句話徹底翻盤。語氣從卑微轉為決絕。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: For 3 years, I took everything. Every lonely night, every insult. Turns out I'm the fool. Richard Gallow, it is over.
